model.label: representative gomoku15-M evaluator body (not the shipped net)

assumptions: the evaluator body is exactly the existing service_curve_lab representative model, not the shipped network
CPU and CUDA receive one deterministic model state and byte-identical CPU-generated inputs within every pair
CPU inflight batches execute serially while CUDA inflight batches use one stream per outstanding batch
input generation and host-to-device transfer are excluded from timed regions
CPU intra-op and inter-op thread counts are pinned to one
the diagnostic profile is a readiness smoke; the full 24-cell matrix is a separate campaign
prohibited_inferences: throughput is play strength or decision quality
the descriptive CUDA-to-CPU ratio is a general efficiency claim
the representative evaluator body is the shipped network
wall-clock rows without controlled CPU and GPU power establish energy efficiency
a completed diagnostic automatically promotes the A15 scheduler
diagnostic-profile results substitute for the full matrix
